name: Tengfeng Lin
title: Ph.D Candidate
affiliation: Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST)

bio: I am a Ph.D candidate at KAIST. My research focuses on deep learning for pedestrian safety, spatiotemporal data modeling in transportation, generative AI for transportation and mobility data, and conflict-based crash prediction.
researchInterests: Generative AI for Transportation and Mobility Data
